family.pageSubtitle: Add and manage your children's profiles for bookings and waivers.

bookEquipment.seoDescription: Rent quality Duotone and Core equipment for your kitesurfing session. All gear maintained daily with safety equipment included.
bookEquipment.heroBody: Rent premium Duotone and Core equipment for your session! All gear is maintained daily and includes safety equipment. From complete kite sets to individual items, we have everything you need for a perfect day on the water.
bookEquipment.readyBody: Book your equipment now and enjoy premium gear for your session.
bookEquipment.noServicesDesc: No specific rental services configured yet. Contact us to book equipment directly!
